accessibility_findings.description: White text on red CTA button (#e73433) fails WCAG AA: 4.25:1 vs 4.5:1 required
accessibility_findings.recommendation: Darken button to accent-300 (#ca1918) for ~6:1 ratio

accessibility_findings.description: Status colors at -500 scale too dark for text on card surfaces (danger, success, warning, info)
accessibility_findings.recommendation: Use -700 tokens for status text in dark mode

accessibility_findings.description: Neutral-300 (#5a5a5a) input border borderline fails 3:1 UI contrast on dark backgrounds

exploratory.charter: Skipped — P2 story, low-risk theme addition
